rate.label: Inferock DEFAULT ASSUMPTION - not customer-confirmed, not provider-recognized loss (default — override)
rate.oneLineWhy: BLS median software developer wage, loaded by BLS private-industry benefit share.

thresholds.label: interactive streaming / non-reasoning (default — override)
thresholds.selectionReason: interactive streaming inferred from default live bench traffic; non-reasoning selected because no reasoning/thinking evidence was captured
thresholds.thresholdSummary: good start 1s; acceptable start 10s; good output 50 tokens/sec; acceptable output 44 tokens/sec; good total adds 20ms/output token; acceptable total adds 23ms/output token
thresholds.oneLineWhy: Nielsen 1s/10s response-time limits plus OpenAI/Azure/Bedrock published TPS anchors.

surfaces.label: 1 signal emitted
surfaces.normalUsageRationale: Schema or JSON mode was requested by normal task traffic.

surfaces.label: not-applicable: not applicable to non-Anthropic provider traffic
surfaces.normalUsageRationale: Anthropic output-token traffic is present for calibrated recount or gross-bound fallback cross-checking.
surfaces.notOpenableReason: not applicable to non-Anthropic provider traffic

details.caveat: Anthropic does not publish a local tokenizer for Claude 3 or later models, and no API returns an independent recount of billed output tokens. Anthropic-side token recounts in this standard are computed against Anthropic's own count_tokens endpoint (documented by Anthropic as an estimate) applied to the delivered output text, with per-model calibration constants and a stated tolerance band; offline estimates use the last tokenizer Anthropic published (Claude 1/2-era, MIT) and are labeled approximate. This is an approximation pending an official public Anthropic tokenizer and will be replaced by it on release.
